_comment: Operator allow/deny list of verified cross-venue pairs. Copy to match_allowlist.json and edit. In live mode (MATCH_REQUIRE_ALLOWLIST_FOR_LIVE=true) only 'approved' pairs are tradeable. 'polarity' is aligned (Kalshi-YES == PM YES token) or inverted (Kalshi-YES == PM NO token).

approved.note: manually confirmed same resolution criteria + close date
